marketing.channels.eyebrow: Sell everywhere people shop. Online and in person. Across AI and on social. Locally and globally.
marketing.chat.body: Your products get discovered across AI channels. Shoppers check out right in the chat. You keep track of every order. All powered by Agentic Storefronts.
marketing.chat.botMessage: Here are top-rated picks from this storefront that match your style.
marketing.chat.title: Your brand has entered the chat
marketing.chat.userMessage: Find me minimalist desk accessories under $100.
marketing.dev.body: Shopify's Universal Commerce Protocol and APIs, tools, and primitives give devs the power to build agentic commerce experiences that businesses are looking for.
marketing.dev.title: Hyperdriven by AI. Commerce to the core.
marketing.features.channels.body: Put your products where shoppers search, shop, and scroll with multichannel integration.
marketing.features.channels.title: Sell on every channel
marketing.features.inPerson.body: Sell in person and keep online and in-store sales in sync with Shopify POS.
marketing.features.inPerson.title: Sell face to face
marketing.features.sellMore.body: Get a stunning store that's built to sell. Design fast with AI. Pick a prebuilt theme. Or go totally custom.
marketing.features.sellMore.title: Sell more in more places
marketing.features.shopApp.body: Automatically show up on the Shop app. Reach millions of pre-verified shoppers.
marketing.features.shopApp.title: Sell to 250M+ shoppers with Shop
marketing.global.body: Take the complexity out of international selling with Shopify Markets. Deliver products faster and more affordably with built-in shipping tools.
marketing.global.subtitle: Sell across borders
marketing.global.title: Grow around the world
marketing.growth.story1.body: Jackie Prince launched Guests on Earth out of her home. Now it's a $4M+ business.
marketing.growth.story1.title: Get started fast
marketing.growth.story2.body: Our Place grew from a one-product shop into a cookware empire.
marketing.growth.story2.title: Grow as big as you want
marketing.growth.story3.body: Iconic toymaker Mattel sells direct to shoppers all around the world. All powered by Shopify.
marketing.growth.story3.title: Raise the bar
marketing.growth.title: For anyone from entrepreneurs to enterprise
marketing.hero.lead: Architects of AI and innovation in marketing
marketing.hero.phrase1: We're reinventing what you already know.
marketing.hero.phrase2: As architects of creativity, we harness the power of modern technology and digitalization.
marketing.hero.phrase3: We deliver new tools and a fresh perspective on marketing.
marketing.howItWorks.step1.body: We work with recognizable brands and manufacturers across industries. After signing an agreement, we receive official marketing materials and guidelines for the campaigns we run.
marketing.howItWorks.step1.imageAlt: Business team discussing partnerships with global brands
marketing.howItWorks.step1.title: We partner with global brands
marketing.howItWorks.step2.body: Our team of digital marketing, analytics, and performance specialists turns supplied assets into advanced advertising campaigns. We use modern traffic optimization, automation, and data analysis technologies to maximize the effectiveness of every campaign.
marketing.howItWorks.step2.imageAlt: Analyst reviewing digital campaign performance on screen
marketing.howItWorks.step2.title: We build high-performing digital campaigns
marketing.howItWorks.step3.body: Thanks to our own technology solutions, we can dynamically increase campaign reach while maintaining high cost efficiency. Our systems continuously monitor results and automatically adjust campaign parameters to user behavior.
marketing.howItWorks.step3.imageAlt: Modern technology infrastructure supporting campaign scaling
marketing.howItWorks.step3.title: We scale advertising operations
marketing.howItWorks.step4.body: Campaigns are directed at carefully selected audience groups. Our goal is to deliver users who are genuinely interested in our advertisers' products and services, which translates into higher marketing effectiveness.
marketing.howItWorks.step4.imageAlt: Team planning outreach to the right audience segments
marketing.howItWorks.step4.title: We generate valuable traffic
marketing.howItWorks.step5.body: As part of our operations, we use an extensive marketing infrastructure that supports traffic acquisition. It enables analysis of user behavior, testing of different campaign variants, and real-time optimization of ad parameters.
marketing.howItWorks.step5.extra: The entire process runs smoothly and invisibly to the end user, so the audience experience remains natural while advertisers receive better-matched traffic and more effective campaign results.
marketing.howItWorks.step5.imageAlt: Developer working on user journey optimization
marketing.howItWorks.step5.title: Intelligent user journey optimization
marketing.howItWorks.step6.body: Our compensation is directly tied to the effectiveness of the campaigns we run. We earn from generated traffic and advertising results while bearing the costs of ad distribution on individual platforms. This model motivates us to continuously optimize and deliver the best possible outcomes for our partners.
marketing.howItWorks.step6.imageAlt: Charts and reports showing advertising campaign results
marketing.howItWorks.step6.title: Performance-based billing model
marketing.howItWorks.title: How does it work?

marketing.sidekick.body: Spot opportunities for growth and automate tedious tasks with Sidekick. Built right into your Shopify admin.
marketing.sidekick.prompt: Create a launch plan for our new spring collection.
marketing.sidekick.response: Done. I drafted campaign ideas, a discount strategy, and homepage modules to feature your bestsellers.
marketing.sidekick.subtitle: Your very own commerce AI
marketing.sidekick.title: Meet your secret weapon, Sidekick
marketing.sidekick.winningBody: Hear how brands use Sidekick to build faster and smarter.
marketing.stability.body: Your Shopify store runs strong, even during your most epic product drops.
marketing.stability.quote: Shopify Capital has given us the funding we need to stock up on inventory and grow rapidly.
marketing.stability.title: Rock steady. Blazing fast.
marketing.stats.note: Shopify Checkout with Shop Pay converts up to 50% higher than guest checkout and exposes your brand to hundreds of millions of buyers. Based on external study with a Big Three global consulting firm in April, 2023.
marketing.stats.title: There's no better place for you to build
